items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
New arrival 🅰️🅰️ CE kelly handbag 👜
New , full of high-class feel!
Simple and exquisite silhouette. Whether it's the steady black, low-key brown, classic old print color matching, etc..., it all exudes incomparable high-class feel ❤️ The Kelly classic silhouette has simple and generous lines. No need for extra decoration. It immediately shows aesthetic charm 🫶🏻
Model No.: 118113 Patent Black
Dimensions: 20.5x13x8 (with original packaging)

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
New in stock 🅰️🅰️ TILLY Shoulder Bag〰️
CE 2024 Chinese New Year Limited Edition TILLY Handbag.
The latest rounded shoulder bag, continuing the tone of the CE CROQUE handbag. This minimalist style handbag is adorned with TRIOMPHE metal hardware. It can hold a phone, car keys, cosmetics, and other essentials. The capacity is sufficient. The bag shape is structured, with a zipper closure. It has 1 main compartment and 1 interior flat pocket. The shoulder strap is adjustable. Compared to the previous Tilly, this one is more retro and cute 😍!
Model No.: 115703
Color: Patent Black (with original packaging)
Dimensions: 22x13.5x4

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
New arrival🅰️🅰️ TEEN LOLA Bestseller❇️
CE Fall/Winter New TEEN LOLA Logo Print Handbag👜.
Another masterpiece from the Triumph family, Teen Lola is here. TRIO MPHE magnetic closure, 1 interior compartment, 1 interior flat pocket, detachable and adjustable long shoulder strap. The bag exudes ultimate French elegance and can easily hold a phone, compact powder, lipstick, card holder, and other daily essentials! Not only is it small, exquisite, and cute, but it can also be carried by hand, crossbody, or over the shoulder for various looks🫶🏻
Style: 119533
Color: Khaki (with original packaging)
Size: 20x11.5x5cm

items.name_cn:
Genuine quality
New Arrival🅰️🅰️
Celine 23 Early Spring Lisa Style Mini ~besace
The real thing is so beautiful, retro and stylish, looks good with any outfit! The curved bottom and flap design make it look younger. Compared to the relatively mini style, the handle design is both playful and cute, a style you'll fall in love with at first glance, carrying it for photos is full of elegance. Can be worn crossbody or shoulder, or carried by hand!
Style: Retro, stylish, cute style~
Capacity: Large phone doesn't fit, can hold keys, tissues, compact powder, 💄
Model: 10K502 Mocha Brown (Pure steel hardware)
Size: 15.5-11.5-5 (with original packaging)

C House Triomphe Backpack

items.name_en: Large 44cm New Arrival 26 Spring Series New Smile Bag 👛
items.name_cn:
Large 44cm New Arrival 26 Spring Series New Smile Bag 👛
😐 turns to 🙂, the CE Smile Bag returns refreshed!
CE PRINTEMPS 2026 Spring Series!
NEW LARGE New Smile Bag
The classic from memory, returns with a fresh look!
👜 Lightweight material, modern lines
It is still that It Bag with maximum recognizability!
Exuding a simple and sleek modern temperament. The new Creative Director Michael Rider surprised everyone with the return of the "Smile Bag" at the 2026 Spring debut. The smooth, fine, and glossy leather, combined with topstitching and piping, shapes a soft, rounded horizontal silhouette. The side zipper design presents a unique smile arc, cleverly echoing the name "Smile Bag." By reinterpreting the classic design with a modern silhouette, the overall bag is lighter and more versatile, presenting an elegant yet casual style!
Style No.: 123683
Color: Black
Dimensions: Base 44x16x30cm, Opening 69cm

items.name_en: LOUISE Small Smooth Calfskin Handbag 24s New Louise Bucket Bag
items.name_cn:
LOUISE Small Smooth Calfskin Handbag 24s New Louise Bucket Bag
Calling all the besties who previously planted a seed for the 16 bucket bag📣
This year's Louise lock adds an Arc de Triomphe element
Enhances the recognition of this bucket bag, making it more fashionable and exquisite
Meets hand-carry/crossbody/shoulder needs with a very considerable capacity
Completely stress-free for daily commute/business trips/office 👏
Besties who like it can buy with confidence~
Leather flap with TRIOMPHE magnetic snap
1 main compartment
1 leather top handle, 3 inches (7 cm) long
Detachable and adjustable shoulder strap, min length 19 inches (48 cm), max length 21 inches (53.5 cm)
Dimensions 6 X 7 X 5 inches (16 X 19 X 12 cm)
Item No.: 119173
